summary: CP-5 closes as pass_with_conditions. S9 resolves the D04 unit-design decision direction through a derived references/data overlay and review packet, but does not authorize or execute protected machine mutation.

explicit_decisions.decision: Keep unit_design_status as a derived references/data overlay for now.
Redistribute D04 content to successor elasticity units and retire the standalone D04 unit later through CLI.
Use A15/D06 for price elasticity, A17/D11 for income elasticity, and A16/D12/D27 for cross elasticity and substitutes/complements.
Keep D04 blocked for C-to-B promotion and student-facing projection until later CLI mutation.
No protected machine mutation is authorized in S9.

accepted_outcomes: The derived overlay in references/data/unit-design-status/unit-design-status-overlay.json may remain the active internal unit-design-status surface.
The D04 decision direction is settled for CP-5: redistribute content to successor elasticity units and retire D04 later through CLI.
The dependent-unit audit is sufficient for CP-5 closure.
D04 remains blocked for promotion and student-facing projection until a later CLI-only mutation sprint executes the decision.
blocked_outcomes: No unit-deprecate.js, unit-merge.js, or unit-split.js execution in S9.
No machine-unit unit_design_status field migration in S9.
No exercise promotion relying on D04 before later CLI mutation.
No student diagnostics, adaptive routing, mastery decisions, automatic sequencing, student-facing AI, summative decisions, PV projection, or PV machine promotion.
conditions_to_reopen_or_pass: A later CLI-only mutation sprint must specify the exact D04 mutation target: retire, merge, split, or redistribute concrete citations and references.
The later mutation sprint must include CLI command selection, mutation log, regenerated machine projections, reports, RAG chunks, source manifest, and document inventory.
The later mutation sprint must verify stale D04 references after mutation.
D04 remains an internal unit-design issue until the later sprint completes.
Generated reports and RAG chunks must continue to preserve non-authority and promotion-blocked labels.
later_required_work: Create a D04 CLI-only mutation sprint.
Select unit-deprecate.js, unit-merge.js, or unit-split.js only after concrete target specs are written.
Record a mutation log and regenerate all affected reports and RAG surfaces.
